errors.300: The requested resource has multiple options. Please select an appropriate one.

errors.302: The resource is temporarily moved. Try again later or follow the redirect.
errors.307: The resource has been temporarily moved to a different URL.
errors.308: The resource has been permanently moved to a different URL.
errors.400: The request was invalid. Check your input and try again.
errors.401: You need to log in to access this resource.
errors.402: Access is restricted to paid users.
errors.403: You do not have permission to access this resource.
errors.404: The requested resource could not be found. Check the URL.
errors.405: The HTTP method used is not allowed for this resource.
errors.406: The requested resource is not available in a format acceptable to your request.
errors.407: Authentication with a proxy server is required.
errors.408: The server took too long to respond. Try again later.
errors.409: There was a conflict with the request. Check for duplicate actions.
errors.410: The resource is no longer available and will not be available again.
errors.411: The request must include a valid Content-Length header.
errors.412: One or more conditions given in the request header were not met.
errors.413: The request payload exceeds the allowable limit.
errors.414: The requested URL is too long to process.
errors.415: The request has a media type that the server does not support.
errors.416: The requested range is invalid or not available.
errors.417: The server cannot meet the expectations in the request.
errors.418: This is a joke response indicating an invalid request.
errors.421: The request was sent to a server that cannot produce a valid response.
errors.422: The request was well-formed but could not be processed.
errors.423: The resource is locked and cannot be modified.
errors.424: A previous request dependency failed, causing this request to fail.
errors.425: The request was sent too early and may be retried later.
errors.426: The client must upgrade to a different protocol to access this resource.
errors.428: The request must include specific preconditions.
errors.429: You have made too many requests in a short period. Try again later.
errors.431: The request headers are too large to process.
errors.451: The resource is blocked due to legal restrictions.
errors.500: Something went wrong on our end. Try again later.
errors.501: The server does not support the requested functionality.
errors.502: Received an invalid response from the upstream server. Try again later.
errors.503: The server is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
errors.504: The server took too long to respond. Please try again later.
errors.505: The server does not support the requested HTTP version.
errors.506: The server encountered a configuration error.
errors.507: The server is out of storage space.
errors.508: The request resulted in an infinite loop.
errors.510: Further extensions to the request are required.
errors.511: Authentication is required to access the network.

home.motto: Open to part-time B2B contracts · 3+ years senior-level experience
home.valueProp: I build complex web applications from scratch — fast. Vue, React, TypeScript, Node. EV charging platforms, data-lineage tooling, and the infrastructure that holds it all together.
home.nowDesc: Data-provenance & integrity platform for Earth Observation data — D3.js lineage viz, client-side hash-chain verification, zero-trust auth with AWS Cognito.
home.workP: Every project below I shipped — infrastructure, backend, and UI.
home.servicesP: Part-time B2B engagements. I take full responsibility for the area I own — architecture, code, delivery, deployment.
home.service1Title: Ship a new product from zero
home.service1Desc: You have an idea and a deadline. I set up the repo, pick the stack, design the data layer, ship the MVP, and deploy it to production. EV-charging platform went from 0 to public launch in 5 months.
home.service2Desc: Flaky deploys, rotting codebase, missing CI, nobody knows how it works. I diagnose, stabilize, document, and set up the pipelines so your team can move again.
home.service3Title: Grow the platform alongside the team
home.service3Desc: Ongoing fractional senior engineer. Code review, architecture decisions, mentoring juniors, owning the parts nobody else wants. Currently doing this for CORAC Engineering & Intedat.
home.testimonialsH2: Real feedback from real teammates and managers.
home.testimonialsP: Pulled directly from LinkedIn recommendations — unedited.
home.projectCoraSithDesc: Client-side hash-chain verification, D3.js supply-chain graphs, and zero-trust auth for a sensitive EO data pipeline. 1yr+ ongoing, sole frontend engineer.
home.projectIontChargeDesc: Public EV-charger payment gateway. ČSOB integration, Docker Swarm, Fastify + MongoDB.
home.projectCoraScorecardDesc: Cyber audit tool. NIS2 compliance, PDF export.
home.projectIontAdminDesc: Charger control panel with real-time firmware updates and station diagnostics.
home.projectPangolinDesc: Interactive analytics dashboard with complex data viz.
home.projectNotefulDesc: Note-taking app with tag hierarchies & real-time sync.
home.projectDisenchantmentDesc: A minecraft plugin that enhances the vanilla enchanting system.
home.testimonial1Quote: "His problem-solving skills and experienced approach shined through. He is excellent at explaining tools and procedures to less experienced team members. Anyone would be lucky to have him."
home.testimonial2Quote: "Jan's ability to tackle complex technical solutions and successfully overcome challenges was truly remarkable. He displayed not only technical expertise but also management skills — breaking work into smaller items so multiple team members could contribute seamlessly."
home.testimonial2Role: Senior Backend Developer · Direct manager, Precismo
home.testimonial3Quote: "Happy to recommend him for his amazing problem-solving skills and fast learning pace. He quickly picked up on new technology he hadn't used before and very quickly excelled at it."
home.testimonial4Quote: "A versatile asset to any team. He consistently demonstrated his ability to turn project requirements into successful web applications. I wholeheartedly recommend Jan for his strong technical skills and commitment to delivering results."

resume.label: ◆ Resumé · 2026
resume.subtitle: Senior Frontend / Fullstack Engineer — 4+ yrs — Prague, CZ
resume.bio: I build complex web applications from scratch — fast. Vue, React, TypeScript, deep backend experience in Node, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker. I've led an EV charging platform with its own payment system and built zero-trust data-lineage tooling.
resume.expP: Ordered newest to oldest. Concurrent roles noted. Current engagements marked in green.
resume.quickSummary: I am a Senior Frontend / Fullstack Engineer with a passion for building complex applications from scratch and a reputation for rapid problem-solving. My core expertise is in Vue.js, React.js, and TypeScript, backed by robust full-stack experience — including leading development of an EV charging platform with its own payment system and Docker-based service infrastructure. With a strong foundation in Cybersecurity and currently pursuing a B.S. in Applied Computer Science at the Prague University of Economics and Business, I excel at tackling difficult technical challenges and leading projects to successful completion.
about: I am a Senior Frontend / Fullstack Engineer based in Prague, specializing in Vue.js, React.js, and TypeScript while maintaining deep full-stack experience. I currently work as a freelance Senior Frontend Engineer at CORAC Engineering, building technically advanced, cloud-integrated applications, and as a Fullstack Engineer at Intedat, developing robust systems with Node.js, AdonisJS, PostgreSQL, and Redis. A recent highlight is leading the backend and DevOps architecture for Diář FISáka — a university project where I designed the containerized infrastructure, built a Node.js REST API, and implemented async background workers using BullMQ.

My academic background in Applied Computer Science at the Prague University of Economics and Business has broadened my skill set beyond pure development. I've gained knowledge in marketing, UX design, economics, management, and data analytics with tools like Microsoft Power BI—enabling me to approach projects from both technical and business standpoints.

Professionally, I've taken on roles ranging from IT Support to Frontend and Fullstack Development across diverse environments. These experiences have sharpened my problem-solving abilities and adaptability, especially in freelance and cross-functional team settings. I also bring a foundation in cybersecurity, further strengthening my focus on building secure and dependable systems.

Driven by a passion for clean code, modern frameworks, and meaningful digital experiences, I thrive in collaborative environments that value innovation, precision, and user-centered design. Whether it's architecting a scalable backend, crafting an elegant UI, or navigating complex challenges, I'm committed to delivering practical and impactful software solutions.

contact.intro: Available for part-time B2B engagements, up to ~10 hours per week. I reply within 24 hours on weekdays.
contact.whatToIncludeText: Briefly: the problem, expected scale, current team & stack, timeline, and budget range. The more concrete, the faster I can say "yes, and here's how" or "not the right fit — try X".
contact.skipFormDesc: Grab 30 minutes. We'll chat through your project and see if it's a fit.
contact.fillFormDescription: Looking for a senior dev on a flexible part-time B2B basis? Fill out the form and I'll get back to you soon.
